title: vermeulenia × dafnii
intro: Vermeulenia × dafnii, also known as Vermeulenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a hybrid of Vermeulenia vermeuliana and Daffodil (Narcissus pseudonarcissus), and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to provide relief from congestion and inflammation, and is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its health benefits. Vermeulenia × dafnii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory distress and promote overall well-being.
